title: Drive-Through Car Wash
scene: 你第一次用自助洗车机。

turns.cn: 基础洗八块，加蜡十二。
turns.en: Basic wash is eight bucks. With wax is twelve.

turns.cn: 加蜡吧，天窗要关吗？
turns.en: With wax, please. Should I close the sunroof?

turns.cn: 关好，后视镜折进去，挂N档。
turns.en: Close it. Fold mirrors in and put it in neutral.

turns.cn: 脚要不要踩刹车？
turns.en: Do I keep my foot on the brake?

turns.cn: 不用，跟着传送带走就行。
turns.en: No, just let the conveyor pull you through.

turns.cn: 洗完在哪擦干？
turns.en: Where do I dry off after?

turns.cn: 出口有免费吸尘器和毛巾架。
turns.en: Free vacuums and towel racks at the exit.

title: Hand Wash Detail
scene: 你预约了车内精洗服务。

turns.cn: 全套内饰一百二，大概两小时。
turns.en: Full interior detail is a hundred twenty, about two hours.

turns.cn: 座椅上有咖啡渍，能去掉吗？
turns.en: There's a coffee stain on the seat. Can you get it out?

turns.cn: 八成能清，严重的话会淡很多。
turns.en: Usually yes. Bad ones fade a lot.

turns.cn: 后备箱也清理吗？
turns.en: Does that include the trunk?

turns.cn: 含吸尘和擦拭，个人物品请先拿走。
turns.en: Vacuum and wipe-down included. Remove personal items first.

turns.cn: 好了，四点来取。
turns.en: Sounds good. I'll pick it up at four.

turns.cn: 我们会发短信通知。
turns.en: We'll text you when it's ready.

title: Brake Noise
scene: 刹车吱吱响，你去修理店检查。

turns.cn: 刹车踩下去有尖叫声。
turns.en: My brakes squeal when I press the pedal.

turns.cn: 可能是刹车片磨薄了，我开一圈听听。
turns.en: Pads might be worn. Let me take it for a quick listen.

turns.cn: 严重吗？还能开多久？
turns.en: Is it serious? How long can I drive like this?

turns.cn: 还能开几百英里，但尽快换。
turns.en: A few hundred miles, but swap them soon.

turns.cn: 前后一起换多少钱？
turns.en: How much for front and rear?

turns.cn: 零件加人工大概三百五。
turns.en: About three fifty parts and labor.

turns.cn: 今天能换吗？
turns.en: Can you do it today?

title: Tire Rotation
scene: 你去做定期轮胎换位和打气。

turns.cn: 换位免费，胎压我帮您测。
turns.en: Rotation's free with your service. I'll check tire pressure.

turns.cn: 胎压应该打多少？
turns.en: What PSI should they be?

turns.cn: 门框贴纸写三十二，现在都偏低。
turns.en: Thirty-two on the door sticker. They're all a bit low.

turns.cn: 右前轮磨损是不是快一点？
turns.en: Is the right front wearing faster?

turns.cn: 轻微偏磨，换位后会均匀些。
turns.en: Slight uneven wear. Rotation should even it out.

turns.cn: 谢谢，还要等多久？
turns.en: Thanks. How much longer?

turns.cn: 十五分钟就好。
turns.en: About fifteen minutes.

title: Smog Check
scene: 你去做加州式的尾气年检。

turns.cn: 注册快到期了？检测费五十五。
turns.en: Registration expiring? The smog check is fifty-five.

turns.cn: 对，去年换过氧传感器。
turns.en: Yes. I replaced the oxygen sensor last year.

turns.cn: 发动机暖机五分钟再测。
turns.en: Warm up the engine for five minutes first.

turns.cn: 没过的话怎么办？
turns.en: What if it doesn't pass?

turns.cn: 免费复测一次，修好后两周内。
turns.en: One free retest within two weeks after repairs.

turns.cn: 过了会给我报告吗？
turns.en: Will I get a report if I pass?

turns.cn: 电子传DMV，您手机也能看。
turns.en: It's sent electronically to the DMV. You can view it on your phone too.

title: Repair Estimate
scene: 修理厂报价偏高，你和师傅商量。

turns.cn: 变速箱和刹车一起修，报价一千二。
turns.en: Transmission and brakes together, twelve hundred quoted.

turns.cn: 能分开做吗？先修刹车站得住吗？
turns.en: Can we split it? Are brakes okay to do first?

turns.cn: 刹车四百可以先做，变速箱再预约。
turns.en: Brakes are four hundred now. Schedule transmission later.

turns.cn: 用副厂件能便宜多少？
turns.en: How much cheaper with aftermarket parts?

turns.cn: 大概省一百五，质保短一点。
turns.en: About a hundred fifty less, shorter warranty.

turns.cn: 刹车用副厂，今天能取车吗？
turns.en: Aftermarket for brakes. Can I get the car back today?

turns.cn: 五点前可以。
turns.en: Before five PM, yes.
